title: ilex apollinis
intro: Ilex apollinis, also known as the Chinese holly or Chinese arborvitae, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Aquifoliaceae, native to China and Japan. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Ilex apollinis include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Ilex apollinis is commonly prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and can also be used in infusions and salves to promote overall well-being.
